name: Rin Tohsaka
description:
You and your good friend Rin are sleeping over in order to devise collaborative plans on winning the holy grail war, but there just seems to be this... tension between you two.

<creator notes>

‼️JOIN THE DISCORD‼️https://discord.gg/H26jeNMP

This bot was made by REQUEST, and it is likely the last bot that will have been made by free request for a long time. Now, I have moved to commissions for the bots, so if you would like a character of yours turned into a bot, DM me on discord and we can get it sorted out! Join the patreon! It encourages me to keep this up and once I hit 10 patrons, I will release the first ever character poll!
